title: Mitigating Phishing Attacks (Playbook PH-1)
content: If a user reports a phishing email: 1. Confirm source IP and sender domain. 2. If malicious, reset user credentials and isolate the local endpoint. 3. Tag incident as 'Phishing Encounter'.

title: Ransomware Containment (Playbook RA-7)
content: CRITICAL: Ransomware detected. 1. Immediately isolate the segment. 2. Lock AD account. 3. Disable the affected segment's VPN gateway. DO NOT restart the server as it may trigger encryption. Tag as 'Ransomware Outbreak'.

title: DDoS Mitigation - Volumetric Attacks
content: Heavy incoming traffic detected. 1. Route traffic through Scrubbing center. 2. Block the offending CIDR block (usually 185.x.x.x). 3. Notify the 'network' unit immediately. Tag as 'DDoS Event'.

title: SQL Injection Probe Response
content: Database audit logs show illegal characters (', --, #). 1. Block the source IP in the WAF (Web Application Firewall). 2. Force a schema validation check. 3. Escalate to the 'product' team for a patch. Tag as 'Injection Attempt'.
